body:
Closes https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/5365

EDIT: For the record, this is the MWE:

```julia
using Oceananigans
using Random: seed!
seed!(426) # Maximize reproducibility

grid = RectilinearGrid(size = (4, 4, 4), extent = (1, 1, 1))
model = NonhydrostaticModel(grid, closure = DynamicSmagorinsky())
set!(model, u = (x, y, z) -> randn())
@show model.closure_fields.νₑ
```
title: (0.105.5) Fix `initialize_closure_fields!()` use with `DynamicSmagorinsky`

body:
Tests that all 9 advective momentum flux kernels return zero at immersed peripheral nodes, for Centered(2), UpwindBiased(3), and WENO(5). This documents the expected behavior after PR #4987 removed the explicit conditional_flux zeroing from _advective_momentum_flux_* on ImmersedBoundaryGrid, relying instead on velocity masking in immersed cells and the no-penetration BC at the boundary face.

cc @simone-silvestri
title: (0.105.5) Add unit test for zero momentum flux at immersed peripheral nodes
